name: 10-slide pitch deck for a Series A fundraise
description: A startup founder wants a 10-slide pitch deck for a Series A raise. Product: AI-powered customer support for small e-commerce. Metrics: $2M ARR, 20% MoM growth, 200 customers, 80 NPS, burn $200K/month. Raising $8M at $40M pre.
task: Generate a complete 10-slide Series A pitch deck for an AI customer support SaaS. Stats: $2M ARR, 20% MoM growth, 200 customers, 80 NPS, burning $200K/month, raising $8M at $40M pre. Produce: (1) the slide order with titles, (2) full content for each slide (not just bullet-point placeholders — real narrative copy), (3) key visuals or chart types per slide, (4) one sentence on what the founder should emphasize verbally per slide. Follow standard Series A deck structure (problem, solution, traction, market, competition, business model, team, ask). Make the copy compelling and specific, not generic.
expected_outcomes: 10 slides covering the standard Series A topics
Real specific copy, not placeholder 'your value prop here'
Clear ask slide with use of funds
